text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like summer camp is over...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, along with the necessity of keeping the sun's
rays at bay. It was a good summer, though. And...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: King, Sei, and I are off to the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And me and Grass are off to the Mainichi Okan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, surely you understand who it is we're up
against, correct?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... An awesome champion. Someone that no
one can keep up with...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But I'll catch up to her... If she's the sea, then
beyond her lies the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I won't wish you the best, El. I need to focus on
myself if I want to prove to be a worthy
opponent.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then... I'll beat both of ya! You and Suzuka are
both goin' down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A three-way battle between champion and
challengers. This fall is looking to be much more
intense than I thought.
